sections.paragraph:
Original: בּרקוס

Transliteration: barqôs

Phonetic: bar-kose'

BDB Definition:

Barkos = "the son cut off"
  1. head of a family of temple-slaves who returned from exile with Zerubbabel

Origin: of uncertain derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
